demo.code:
# Full 30-day cross-platform scan
aeon-last30 topic="restaking yields"

# Top 3 per source
aeon-last30 topic="agentic payments" mode=quick

# Bias toward dissent
aeon-last30 topic="Polymarket vs Kalshi" mode=contrarian

setup: Configure per-source credentials if you want authenticated access (Reddit, X)
